creator: r.s.a.vandomburg@nedforce.nl
text:
My primary e-mail address has changed. This updates the capistrano port that I maintain accordingly.

Fix: -MAINTAINER=    r.s.a.vandomburg@student.utwente.nl
+MAINTAINER=    r.s.a.vandomburg@nedforce.nl
 COMMENT=       A utility for executing commands in parallel on multiple machines

 BUILD_DEPENDS= rake:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-rake \


- Roderick van Domburg
-r.s.a.vandomburg@student.utwente.nl
+r.s.a.vandomburg@nedforce.nl--QLwB9Dd6uEAtVQH0yaA3EFB66xcVVIB4Cjw8MuSGfnZlxtV9
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ru /usr/ports/sysutils/rubygem-capistrano/Makefile rubygem-capistrano/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/rubygem-capistrano/Makefile     Mon Jun 25 23:03:15 2007
+++ rubygem-capistrano/Makefile Tue Jun 26 12:58:03 2007
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_RUBYFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}
